title: Internal Error: V3DfgPeephole.cpp:1403: Mismatched width
body:
Hi all, I came across an "internal error" related to the power (`**`) operator.
(Found a similar issue here #3714. But I guess they're not the same.)

### Example code

```verilog
module pow_of_2(x, o);
  input [1:0] x;
  output [3:0] o;

  assign o = 4'd2 ** x;
endmodule
```

Verilator cmdline:
```
./bin/verilator -cc pow_of_2.v
```

Verilator output:
```
%Error: Internal Error: pow_of_2.v:5:19: ../V3DfgPeephole.cpp:1403: Mismatched width
    5 |   assign o = 4'd2 ** x;
      |                   ^~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```

### Verilator version

The latest git master (`e5eb7d893018fadaccaaa2be14068e2ddeb1c6bd`)

### OS version

Ubuntu 22.04.1 LTS
